meaning: 金卡丁郡[英国苏格兰原郡名]
examples: When in Kincardine turn left at the mini roundabout.
The nearest alternative route, the Kincardine Bridge, was heavily congested during the day.
Maureen Watt, MSP for Aberdeen South and North Kincardine, has expressed her delight at the news about the plant in Portlethen.
The West Aberdeenshire and Kincardine MSP said continuing to take a "not ruling anything out" approach would not appeal to potential new voters.
